steps.expected: HTTP 200, all results have same resolved block
steps.observed: HTTP 200, both results have block:18573050, block_timestamp:1699999991, price:1.0

assertions.title: Batch with timestamp and amounts combined

steps.expected: HTTP 200, timestamp resolved to block, amounts applied, results returned
steps.observed: HTTP 200, both results have block:18573050, price:1.0, cached:false (amount requests bypass cache as expected)

assertions.title: Batch supports skip_cache and silent params

steps.observed: HTTP 200, second token cached:false (first request), first token cached:true (already in cache from prior tests)

steps.expected: HTTP 200, all results have cached:false (skip_cache bypasses cache read)
steps.observed: HTTP 200, both results have cached:false — skip_cache is observably working
HTTP 200, both results have cached:true — confirms skip_cache wrote fresh values to cache
HTTP 400, {"error":"Invalid skip_cache value: 'maybe'. Must be true, false, 1, or 0."}
HTTP 400, {"error":"Invalid silent value: '2'. Must be true, false, 1, or 0."}

evidence.network: GET /ethereum/prices?...&skip_cache=true&silent=true -> 200 with cached:false for all; GET without skip_cache -> 200 with cached:true; GET with skip_cache=maybe -> 400; GET with silent=2 -> 400

assertions.issues: Assertion requires 'unit test verifying kwargs' as evidence to conclusively prove skip_cache and silent are forwarded as kwargs to get_prices(). From user surface: (1) skip_cache=true observably bypasses cache reads and re-primes cache — strongly implies correct forwarding. (2) silent=true is accepted without error and does not change observable response shape — acceptance is consistent with forwarding but not conclusive proof. Internal kwargs forwarding cannot be verified from HTTP alone.

blockers.description: VAL-BATCH-015 requires 'unit test verifying kwargs' as evidence. Internal kwargs forwarding to get_prices() cannot be conclusively demonstrated from the HTTP user surface alone — only observable behavioral side effects (cache bypass, param acceptance) can be verified.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tested observable behavior: skip_cache=true causes cached:false, silent=true is accepted, invalid values return 400. All consistent with correct forwarding but not conclusive proof of kwargs being passed to get_prices().

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-BATCH-010, VAL-BATCH-011 — timestamp resolution bug is fixed, batch+timestamp and batch+timestamp+amounts both work), 1 blocked (VAL-BATCH-015 — observable behavior consistent with correct skip_cache/silent forwarding, but conclusive kwargs proof requires unit test).
